headline: Wells Fargo Maintains Equal-Weight on Emerson Electric, Raises Price Target to $155
summary: Wells Fargo  analyst Joseph O'Dea   maintains Emerson Electric (NYSE:EMR) with a Equal-Weight and raises the price target from $135 to $155.

headline: Emerson Electric Sees Long-Tailed Growth In The Electrification Megatrend
